description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomfort and keep dry and comfortable. This T-shirt, engineered with Climalite technology, offers you a flattering stylised look. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on your day off, or with shorts and Sports shoes when you're hitting the gym. Product Details Dark blue sleeveless T-shirt, has a round neckline, patterns on the shoulders and back yoke, orange Adidas patented three stripes on the side and branding on the left shoulder Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
